meaning: adj.防风雨的,不受天气影响的,抗风化的vt.使防风雨
examples: The finished roof should be weatherproof for years.
The rust forms a weatherproof layer of protection.
Weatherproof or explosion proof electric actuator.
The IP4X rated weatherproof construction that protects boomBOTTLE from unexpected weather, sweat and other moisture.
Even though most will be in a garage, our 240V charging dock is weatherproof as well.
